inputs.sessionPreset_note: RTH and NY presets resolve to the identical session string (0930-1600 America/New_York) in this Pine script, so this run is functionally equivalent to the requested NY preset.
inputs.sizing_caveat: Fixed quantity=1 unit on FX pairs is trivially small notional relative to the $1,000,000 default account, so max_dd_pct and net_profit_pct round to ~0.00% and are NOT meaningful for the maxDD<=15% criterion on FX under this sizing. winrate and profit_factor are ratio metrics computed from per-trade returns and are unaffected by this sizing choice, so they remain the meaningful basis for the pass/fail verdict here. Kept as instructed (do not switch sizing mode for FX); recorded verbatim as an evidence caveat.

notes: Ablation pure variant (no SL/TP, EOD-only exit, disaster stop OFF). 5m tester history ~3.2-3.4 months -> n<100.
